calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval Of Contingency Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Leahy for petitioner Darryl Lewis, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Approval of Contingency Fee Agreement.

Mr. Lewis confirmed that he supported approval of the agreement. The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
